label: Regime Whipsaw
description: The market flips rapidly between risk_on and risk_off across consecutive windows (fear/greed and breadth swing hard each step). This stresses the regime router and the per-day trade pacing: the engine must damp exposure churn and respect the heartbeat trade cap (max_heartbeat_trade_pct) so whipsaw does not turn into over-trading or runaway drawdown.
expected_detail: Rapid risk_on<->risk_off flips push total_drawdown_pct (14.0) past throttle_soft_pct (12) into the Soft throttle band, and daily_drawdown_pct (6.5) approaches max_daily_drawdown_pct (7). The engine throttles exposure changes and caps rebalance size at max_new_position_pct, while the heartbeat trade cap (max_heartbeat_trade_pct = 2) prevents whipsaw-driven over-trading.
